"Make sure the installed SIM matches [ORIGINAL_AX] [ORIGINAL_AX] number: %1$s.
If [ORIGINAL_AX] phone is dual SIM, [ORIGINAL_AX] can change either SIM."
The phone number of [ORIGINAL_AX] SIM card matches [ORIGINAL_AX] [ORIGINAL_AX] number %1$s

"If [ORIGINAL_AX] have a dual sim phone, go to [ORIGINAL_AX] phone's settings and set the SIM for [ORIGINAL_AX] [ORIGINAL_AX] number %s as the default SIM. Then, remove the other SIM from [ORIGINAL_AX] phone while setting up payments."
Something went wrong verifying [ORIGINAL_AX] phone number by SMS. Check that [ORIGINAL_AX] phone has a reliable connection and can send and receive SMS.
If using a dual SIM phone, [ORIGINAL_AX] may need to switch [ORIGINAL_AX] default SIM and remove the other SIM while setting up payments.

%s is already registered on a different phone.

Confirm on [ORIGINAL_AX] other phone that [ORIGINAL_AX] want to move [ORIGINAL_AX] account to this one.

This helps make sure [ORIGINAL_AX] account stays secure and in [ORIGINAL_AX] control.
%s is already registered on a different phone. A confirmation notice was sent to that phone for [ORIGINAL_AX] security. Learn more
Use [ORIGINAL_AX] other phone to confirm moving [ORIGINAL_AX] to this one
Devices out of sync. There may be an issue with [ORIGINAL_AX] phone clock. Learn more

"Can't [ORIGINAL_AX] because no internal storage is available. [ORIGINAL_AX] unmount it as a disk drive, and try again."

Companion mode allows [ORIGINAL_AX] to link this device to a registered [ORIGINAL_AX] account on [ORIGINAL_AX] phone. Switching to companion mode will log [ORIGINAL_AX] out from [ORIGINAL_AX] current [ORIGINAL_AX] account.
[ORIGINAL_AX] can back up the data for [ORIGINAL_AX] current account using a Google Drive backup.

Before proceeding, [ORIGINAL_AX] ensure [ORIGINAL_AX] have backed up [ORIGINAL_AX] [ORIGINAL_AX]s and media to Google Drive if needed, as this operation will erase all locally stored data and is not reversible.
This operation will erase all locally stored [ORIGINAL_AX] data, including [ORIGINAL_AX] [ORIGINAL_AX]s and media.
"If [ORIGINAL_AX] tried the steps above and [ORIGINAL_AX]'re still seeing this problem, contact support."
[ORIGINAL_AX] has a problem and it needs to be installed again. Tap on the button below to go to the Play Store, uninstall [ORIGINAL_AX], and install it again.

[ORIGINAL_AX] has a problem and it needs to be installed again. Tap on the button below to uninstall [ORIGINAL_AX]. Visit [ORIGINAL_AX].com/android afterwards to [ORIGINAL_AX] and reinstall [ORIGINAL_AX].

"This business can't [ORIGINAL_AX] with phone numbers with [ORIGINAL_AX] country code."

"All groups [ORIGINAL_AX]'re an admin of have already been added to other communities. Create new group"
Image may be subject to copyright. Terms of Service.
[ORIGINAL_AX] have a custom ROM installed. Custom ROMs can cause problems with [ORIGINAL_AX] Messenger and are unsupported by our customer service team.

Custom ROMs have been known to cause problems with keyboard input methods, cloud to device (C2DM) notifications as well as timely and accurate [ORIGINAL_AX] delivery. Further, many custom ROMs are bundled with task killing properties that cause the same problems as a 3rd party task killer. [ORIGINAL_AX] understand that custom ROMs are not supported by %s and that [ORIGINAL_AX] use them at [ORIGINAL_AX] own risk.
"[ORIGINAL_AX]'ve reached the daily transfer limit set by [ORIGINAL_AX] bank. Try again tomorrow."
Are [ORIGINAL_AX] sure [ORIGINAL_AX] want to deactivate \"%s\" community? This action cannot be undone.
Community could not be deactivated. [ORIGINAL_AX] did not create this community, so [ORIGINAL_AX] cannot deactivate it.
Community could not be deactivated. Check [ORIGINAL_AX] Internet connection and try again.
Enter the expiration date. For a Maestro card, enter 01/49.
"Enter an expiry date that's in the future"
Decline call button. Double tap to decline.
Decline switch button. Double tap to decline switching to video call.

Clearing or deleting entire [ORIGINAL_AX]s will remove [ORIGINAL_AX]s from this device only. They will not be removed from other devices.

Removing [ORIGINAL_AX] payment account will cancel any transactions in progress and delete all of [ORIGINAL_AX] payment information.
Removing [ORIGINAL_AX] payment account will cancel any transactions in progress and delete all of [ORIGINAL_AX] payment information including [ORIGINAL_AX] %1$s for [ORIGINAL_AX] orders.

Removing payments from [ORIGINAL_AX] will cancel any transactions in progress and unlink [ORIGINAL_AX] payment methods. To send and receive money on [ORIGINAL_AX], [ORIGINAL_AX]’ll need to set up payments again.

When turned on, all new individual [ORIGINAL_AX]s will start with disappearing [ORIGINAL_AX]s set to the duration [ORIGINAL_AX] select. This setting will not affect [ORIGINAL_AX] existing [ORIGINAL_AX]s. Learn more
This does not affect [ORIGINAL_AX] existing [ORIGINAL_AX]s. Apply this [ORIGINAL_AX] timer to existing [ORIGINAL_AX]s by selecting them

If [ORIGINAL_AX] cancel now, [ORIGINAL_AX] new end-to-end encrypted backup will be deleted.
[ORIGINAL_AX] end-to-end encrypted backup will be replaced by a new backup that is not protected with end-to-end encryption. [ORIGINAL_AX] can turn this setting back on at any time.

[ORIGINAL_AX] current Google Drive backup size is %1$s including %2$s media.
When turned on, [ORIGINAL_AX] backup will be end-to-end encrypted before it gets uploaded to Google Drive. No one, not even Google or [ORIGINAL_AX], will be able to access it.
When turned on, [ORIGINAL_AX] backup will be end-to-end encrypted. No one, not even [ORIGINAL_AX], will be able to access it.

Instead of using a [ORIGINAL_AX], [ORIGINAL_AX] can protect and restore [ORIGINAL_AX] end-to-end encrypted backup with [ORIGINAL_AX] encryption key:

Save [ORIGINAL_AX] key. [ORIGINAL_AX] does not have a copy of it. If [ORIGINAL_AX] forget [ORIGINAL_AX] key and lose [ORIGINAL_AX] phone, [ORIGINAL_AX] cannot help [ORIGINAL_AX] recover [ORIGINAL_AX] backup.

[ORIGINAL_AX] backup is end-to-end encrypted on Google Drive. No one, not even Google or [ORIGINAL_AX], can access it.
[ORIGINAL_AX] backup is end-to-end encrypted. Not even [ORIGINAL_AX] can access it.

While it completes, [ORIGINAL_AX] can use [ORIGINAL_AX] phone and [ORIGINAL_AX] like [ORIGINAL_AX] usually do.

[ORIGINAL_AX] secures [ORIGINAL_AX] conversations with end-to-end encryption. This means [ORIGINAL_AX] [ORIGINAL_AX]s, calls and status updates stay between [ORIGINAL_AX] and the people [ORIGINAL_AX] choose. Not even [ORIGINAL_AX] can read or listen to them.
Accept call button. Double tap to end current call and accept.
[ORIGINAL_AX] feedback is anonymous. [ORIGINAL_AX] uses it to help improve [ORIGINAL_AX] call experience
How was the quality of [ORIGINAL_AX] call?
